title: Add Pixel Comparer demo to Blazor sample
body:
- [x] Explore repository structure and understand SKPixelComparer API
- [x] Copy comparison test images to Blazor wwwroot
- [x] Create PixelComparer.razor page with demo UI
- [x] Add navigation entry in NavMenu.razor
- [x] Add card entry on Home.razor
- [x] Build and verify the Blazor sample
- [x] Address review feedback: disable dropdown while loading + add spinner
- [x] Address review feedback: clear stale results on error
- [x] Address review feedback: add alt text for accessibility
- [x] Implement IDisposable to clean up diffMask on page disposal
- [x] Address review feedback: display error message on page when comparison fails

Screenshots:
- Pixel Comparer page: ![Pixel Comparer](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c92875ed-c6a4-4201-9a0d-6ec895a9410c)
